title: qualea dichotoma var. elongata
intro: Qualea dichotoma var. elongata is a plant species that belongs to the family Ochnaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential use in reducing fever and alleviating pain. The herbal preparation of Qualea dichotoma var. elongata is typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
